root.not_found_desc: Head back to your portfolio to continue.
root.site_description: Invest, track your performance, measure your impact. A clear, responsible experience.

landing.meta_title: Seedow — The ESG audit of your savings
landing.meta_desc: Enter your portfolio, get a transparent ESG audit: weighted score, coverage rate, honest blind spots. No investment pitch.
landing.og_desc: Transparent ESG audit. Enter your portfolio, see what it really funds.
landing.subtitle: The ESG audit of your savings.
landing.manifesto_text: Your savings tell a story. We read it out loud.
landing.demo_desc: Type a ticker, see what your portfolio would say. A taste of the full audit.
landing.demo_data_note: {{name}} · demo data, full audit on your real portfolio.
landing.demo_unknown: Unknown ticker in demo. Try AAPL, TSLA, TTE, MC or NESN.

pillars.1_body: Weighted ESG score on your real portfolio. No simulation, no marketing ranking.
pillars.2_body: Every figure shows its source and date. The methodology is public and reproducible.
pillars.3_body: Uncovered holdings stay visible. An honest audit beats a misleading average.

landing.method_desc: Sector exclusions, weighted ESG scores, explicit coverage rate, time-stamped sources. Every figure can be traced back to its public source.

faqs.a1: Seedow audits your existing portfolio through an ESG lens. You enter your holdings (ISIN or ticker, amount or %), we compute a weighted average score, a data coverage rate and surface the blind spots. No investment pitch — just reading.
faqs.q2: Where do the ESG scores come from?
faqs.a2: Data comes from public providers (Yahoo Finance ESG, MSCI ESG when available). Every score shows its source and date. Uncovered holdings are flagged as ‘unauditable’ — not hidden.
faqs.a3: The audit is free. Later, Seedow will offer a paid realignment service (actionable recommendations, monitoring). The audit itself will stay open.
faqs.a4: No bank data is stored. You enter your holdings manually. You can export or delete your account at any time.

landing.final_title_a: Your savings deserve to be read.
landing.footer_copy: © 2026 Seedow — Editorial reading of your savings.

auth.desc_signup: Test phase — no real transactions. Demo mode only.
auth.desc_beta_full: All 300 beta seats are taken. Leave your email for the next wave.
auth.desc_waitlisted: You're #{{position}} on the list. We'll let you know as soon as a seat opens.

waitlist.meta_desc: The Seedow beta is full. Join the waitlist to be notified when a seat opens.
waitlist.title: All 300 seats are taken.
waitlist.desc: Leave your email — we'll let you know as soon as a seat opens or we release the next wave of testers.

beta.banner_detail: · virtual capital · real prices · no money invested
beta.feedback_thanks_desc: Every message is read personally during the beta.
beta.feedback_desc: 3 questions max. Anonymous to the team unless you want us to reach back.
beta.feedback_nps_label: Would you recommend Seedow? (0 = no, 10 = yes)

portfolio.simple_explainer_post: at the top to see everything.

objectives.empty_desc: Create your first goal to visualize your progress.

community.section_kicker: Discover how other investors build their responsible portfolio.

comparison.title: You vs MSCI World
comparison.subtitle: Three objective metrics: expected return, fees, carbon impact.

discover.title: Which assets?

ethi.error_no_response: Sorry, I can't reply right now.

certificate.meta_desc: Personal edition of the Seedow impact certificate.
certificate.no_portfolio: No active portfolio — no certificate to issue.
certificate.subtitle: Impact certificate · Personal edition
certificate.methodology_body: Indicators are computed from the actual portfolio composition, weighted by the ESG exposures of underlyings (exclusion filter, best-in-class selection, composite E/S/G score). CO₂ avoided is an indicative estimate derived from ESG scores, not a regulatory figure.

profile.meta_desc: Overview of your values, your portfolio and your progress on Seedow.
profile.subtitle: Your values, your portfolio and your progress — at a glance.
profile.values_title: What you finance — and what you refuse
profile.no_causes: No cause defined for this portfolio.
profile.decisions_desc: Every trade, exclusion or rebalance leaves a trace.
profile.comparison_desc: Performance, fees, impact score, CO₂ — figures side by side.

next_step.first_invest_detail: Choose an asset aligned with your values.
next_step.signal_detail: Ask Ethi what this means for you.

invest_dialog.description: Demo experience — no charge is made. The portfolio's declared capital will be updated to reflect the deposit.
invest_dialog.applepay_desc: Confirm with Face ID, Touch ID or your passcode.
invest_dialog.sepa_note: Usual settlement time: 1 to 2 business days. Demo only.
invest_dialog.footer_note: Demo with no real charge · Data encrypted, never stored
invest_dialog.toast_success_desc: Demo: no real charge was made.

alerts.empty: No drift detected on your active portfolio. We'll let you know as soon as a holding moves away from your values or target allocation.

goal.name: Name
goal.sim_unreachable: Goal hard to reach in time. Extend horizon or lower target.

onboarding.name_portfolio_hint: Give it a name that speaks to you — e.g. Climate, Retirement, Responsible tech…
onboarding.account_ethi_msg: Great, I have everything I need ✨ Create your account in 10 seconds so I can save your portfolio.
onboarding.ready_to_start: Your answers are ready. One more step to start.
onboarding.signup_email_check: Account created. Check your email to confirm then come back.
onboarding.intro_desc: Four questions, two minutes. Ethi structures an allocation aligned with your convictions and exclusions.
onboarding.step_values_ethi: Hi, I'm Ethi ✨ I'll help you build your portfolio today. First: what really matters to you?
onboarding.step_values_q: Pick your causes — you can choose several.
onboarding.step_exclusions_ethi: Perfect 💚 And on the flip side, what do you absolutely refuse to fund?
onboarding.step_exclusions_q: These sectors will be fully excluded.
onboarding.step_objective_ethi: Got it. Now: what goal do you want to grow this capital for?
onboarding.step_amount_ethi: How much do you want to start with? We can start small.

reglages.meta_desc: Manage your profile, investment preferences and notifications.
reglages.title: Settings
reglages.subtitle: Profile, preferences, transparency.
reglages.auto_recalc_note: Any change triggers an automatic recalculation of your portfolio through the full pipeline (exclusions → best-in-class → constrained Markowitz optimization → conviction tilts).
reglages.privacy_desc: Your data stays strictly confidential. You can export or delete all your information at any time.
reglages.market_data_desc: Prices are refreshed automatically every business day at close. You can force an immediate update here.
reglages.no_runs: No run logged yet. Force a refresh above to start tracking.
reglages.pipeline_desc: Six traceable steps: profiling, investable universe, sector exclusions, best-in-class ESG filters, constrained Markowitz optimization (ESG floor, risk budget, weight bounds), then pre-optimization tilt of expected returns based on your causes. The interactive simulator and detailed documentation are on the dedicated page.
reglages.engine_version_desc: Methodology v1.1 · E/S/G pillars weighted by causes, real carbon intensity, source traceability. Reviewed quarterly.
